headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Conagra Brands, Lowers Price Target to $13
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Palmer   maintains Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $18 to $13.
